title: OpenStax Calculus Volume 3
description: A source card for the OpenStax Calculus Volume 3 textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Calculus Volume 3 covers vectors, three-dimensional space, partial derivatives, multiple integrals, vector fields, and core ideas in multivariable calculus.
Use this source for older students connecting geometry, physics, engineering, and advanced mathematical language.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.

usagePolicy.reason: This book may not be used in the training of large language models or otherwise be ingested into large language models or generative AI offerings without OpenStax's permission.

licenseAudit.note: OpenStax attribution, noncommercial, and share-alike requirements apply to adaptations. Generative-AI ingestion requires OpenStax permission.
